paragraphs: Rocket Launchers is a student engineering organization at the University of Texas Rio Grande Valley. We design, build, and launch high-power rockets and compete in intercollegiate competitions like the Spaceport America Cup.
Everything we fly is student-built. Members join one of our subteams — from Avionics to Structures to Flight Dynamics — and get hands-on with real aerospace hardware from day one.
No experience required. We teach you what you need as you build alongside the team.

highlights.title: Real Hardware
highlights.description: Design and fly custom rockets every season — not just on paper.

highlights.title: Every Discipline
highlights.description: Avionics, structures, recovery, simulation, manufacturing, and media.

highlights.title: Open to All Majors
highlights.description: Engineering, CS, business, communications — there's a place for you.

join.title: Join the Team
join.body: We recruit at the start of each semester and welcome new members year-round. Come to an interest meeting or reach out — no experience required.
